ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male or female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "boat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number (if survived) */,
  "body_number" INTEGER /* Body number (if not survived) */,
  "home_destination" TEXT /* Home destination of the passenger */,
  "has_cabin_number" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the passenger had a cabin number */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and contact information of an emergency contact */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the passenger's travel (e.g., business, leisure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket_number FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_number") REFERENCES ticket_details ("ticket_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports_of_embarkation ("port_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin_number FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_number") REFERENCES cabin_details ("cabin_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_boat_number FOREIGN KEY ("boat_number") REFERENCES lifeboats ("boat_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_home_destination FOREIGN KEY ("home_destination") REFERENCES home_destinations ("destination_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary passenger */,
  "family_member_type" TEXT /* Type of family member (e.g., spouse, child, parent) */,
  "relative_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relative passenger */,
  "relationship_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the relationship between the primary passenger and the relative */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* A more detailed type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling, spouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_families_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_families_relative_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("relative_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_details" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck of the cabin */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the cabin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cabin */,
  "cabin_layout" TEXT /* A description of the cabin layout (e.g., single room, suite) */,
  "cabin_price" REAL /* The price of the cabin */,
  "cabin_features" TEXT /* Features of the cabin (e.g., bathroom, window, balcony) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_details" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "issuing_office" TEXT /* Office where the ticket was issued */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment for the ticket (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* The status of the ticket (e.g., booked, paid, canceled) */,
  "booking_agent" TEXT /* The name of the booking agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports_of_embarkation" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "port_latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the port */,
  "port_longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the port */,
  "port_population" INTEGER /* Population of the port city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "boat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "launched_time" TEXT /* Time the lifeboat was launched */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Name of the rescue ship */,
  "boat_material" TEXT /* The material of the lifeboat (e.g., wood, metal) */,
  "boat_color" TEXT /* The color of the lifeboat */,
  "boat_weight" REAL /* The weight of the lifeboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rescue_ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rescue ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the rescue ship */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company operating the rescue ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the rescue ship */,
  "ship_length" REAL /* Length of the ship */,
  "ship_breadth" REAL /* Breadth of the ship */,
  "ship_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_lifeboats" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifeboat */,
  "assigned_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger was assigned to the lifeboat */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* The status of the lifeboat assignment (e.g., assigned, not assigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_lifeboats_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_lifeboats_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES lifeboats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_body_details" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "body_number" INTEGER /* Body number assigned during recovery */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the body was recovered */,
  "burial_location" TEXT /* Location of burial or disposition of the body */,
  "body_found_location" TEXT /* The location where the body was found */,
  "body_condition" TEXT /* The condition of the body when found (e.g., intact, partially decomposed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_body_details_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the home destination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the home destination */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the home destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the home destination */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the destination is international */,
  "destination_latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the home destination */,
  "destination_longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the home destination */,
  "destination_population" INTEGER /* Population of the home destination city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, data analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  "version_approved_by" TEXT /* The user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
